properties.address: All Saints Episcopal Church, Gretna, Dumfriesshire DG16 5DH
properties.description: All Saints Church is open to the community from Gretna Green, Gretna and Rigg. We offer a variety of weekly activities and provide a welcoming space throughout the winter months. The church has a large space, meeting rooms, toilets (male, female and disabled) and a fully equipped kitchen.
properties.title: All Saints Episcopal Church and Meeting Room, Gretna

properties.address: 4 South Hermitage Street, Newcastleton, Roxburghshire TD9 0QR
properties.description: A warm and welcoming space for our community to gather. A place to share and create together.
properties.title: Buccleuch House

properties.address: Buccleuch House, 4 South Hermitage Street, Scottish Borders, Scottish Borders TD9 0QR
properties.description: Open from 09-01-2023. Join us in a warm, friendly space. On Tuesdays we will be providing soup and a roll between 12 and 1pm. We have a wide programme of activities, come along and join in..
properties.title: Newcastleton and District Community Trust
